issues.description: Condition missing LeaderIsName check for [Shirahoshi]. Should be {"type":"LeaderIsName","name":"Shirahoshi"} instead of Always
FlipLife action is optional ('you may') but DSL does not reflect optionality. Action should include optional:true or be wrapped in conditional logic

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader is [Shirahoshi], you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-down: Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
